heading: Omitted
label: 1162 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for five hundred thousand dollars of the judgment funds to be held in trust for the purpose of providing education and scholarships for members of the tribes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 90–117, § 281 Stat. 337Oct. 31, 1967
